findings.excerpt: "excerpt": "\"excerpt\": \"\\\"sql\\\": \\\"INSERT INTO fixtures_unified (match_id, home_team, away_team, venue, match_date, match_time, league, status, sport, created_at)\\\\n               SELECT match_id, home_team, away_team, venue, match_date, match_time, league, status, 'cricket', created_at\\\\n               FROM cricket_fixtures;\\\",\""
